content:
I need to look through the code for entities defined in files within a `types` package/directory.

Scanning the imports and file references, I can see types referenced from `@/types/index.js`, `@/types/config.js`, `@/types/extensions/test-analysis.js`, and `@/types/extensions/ts-analysis.js`, but the actual type definition files are not included in the code above — only their imports are shown.

The only concrete classes/interfaces I can find with source locations pointing to a `types` package would need to come from those files, but their implementations aren't in the provided code.

Looking at what's actually defined in the code above, none of the class or interface definitions have their `sourceLocation.file` pointing to a `types` directory — they're all in extractor, mermaid, or core files.

{"answer": 0}
